value.found_quote: The content your agent reads and writes is not recorded by default. These opt-in variables add content to the exported data: | `OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS=1` | Prompt text on `claude_code.user_prompt` events and on the `claude_code.interaction` span | `OTEL_LOG_TOOL_DETAILS=1` | Tool input arguments (file paths, shell commands, search patterns) on `claude_code.tool_result` events
value.name: Prompt text and tool inputs excluded by default with opt-in flags
